LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.description:
A place of learning is essential for our community. A nice collection of marvelous tomes and filled shelves will fill our hearts with joy.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Colonists gets mood penalties / bonuses depending on size of library rooms found in the map. Only library rooms with an impressiveness of "decent" or higher will count for this calculation. Libraries will need to be clean or colonists will complain too!
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.label: required
